prompt: Bug report: our signup accepts an empty email address and creates the account anyway, then downstream notifications fail. Empty (or whitespace-only) emails should be rejected at signup with a clear validation error. Fix it.

assertions.text: The unit suite exists and passes (green) when run
Reproduced as a failing test first: a test capturing the bug is committed at or before the fix
The fix is a small, focused change rather than one large commit
Any cleanup is a separate commit from the fix
The regression test does not mock/stub owned or in-process validation code
No non-null-assertion / null-forgiving operator introduced in the fix
Test names follow Given/When/Then (or When/Then) structure
The empty-email rejection is returned as a named validation result, not a thrown exception
assertions.note: review: rejection is a Result/validation error, not a throw

assertions.text: A regression test asserts the exact reported scenario (empty/whitespace email rejected)
assertions.note: review: test reproduces the original reported failure
